item.title: Fijian-Elections-Office
item.description: The campaign period for the 2026 General Elections is now open.The Fijian Elections Office says the campaign period will end 48 hours before Election Day, in accordance w
item.content:encoded: The campaign period for the 2026 General Elections is now open.The Fijian Elections Office says the campaign period will end 48 hours before Election Day, in accordance w
